<!--------------------------------------------------------------------------------->

Bluetooth firmware functions and scripts for advertising, analytics, bonding, communication, GATT, HRM, identity, logging, pairing, reconnection, responsiveness, and transport in a QEMU environment.


## Files
- **[adv_reconnect.c](adv_reconnect.c.md)**: Defines a function to get advertising job terms for Bluetooth reconnection.
- **[advert.c](advert.c.md)**: Functions for managing Bluetooth advertising, including enabling, disabling, and setting data.
- **[analytics.c](analytics.c.md)**: Functions for Bluetooth analytics, including connection quality and BLE parameter collection.
- **[bonding_sync.c](bonding_sync.c.md)**: Functions for handling the addition and removal of Bluetooth bonding in the Pebble firmware.
- **[bt_classic_stubs.c](bt_classic_stubs.c.md)**: Stub functions for Bluetooth Classic connection management in a QEMU environment.
- **[bt_test.c](bt_test.c.md)**: Bluetooth driver test functions for starting, stopping, and handling HCI passthrough and RF test modes.
- **[comm.c](comm.c.md)**: Bluetooth communication scheduling functions for sending tasks in a QEMU environment.
- **[connectability.c](connectability.c.md)**: Updates Bluetooth driver connectability settings.
- **[features.c](features.c.md)**: Checks if the Bluetooth driver supports classic Bluetooth, returning false.
- **[gap_le_connect.c](gap_le_connect.c.md)**: Implements a function to disconnect a Bluetooth Low Energy device.
- **[gap_le_device_name.c](gap_le_device_name.c.md)**: Functions for requesting Bluetooth GAP LE device names in a QEMU environment.
- **[gap_le_scan.c](gap_le_scan.c.md)**: Functions to start and stop Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) scanning with configurable parameters.
- **[gatt.c](gatt.c.md)**: Functions for handling GATT read subscriptions and sending changed indications in Bluetooth.
- **[gatt_client_discovery.c](gatt_client_discovery.c.md)**: Implements GATT client discovery API functions for starting, stopping, and handling discovery.
- **[gatt_client_operations.c](gatt_client_operations.c.md)**: Implements GATT client operations for reading and writing attributes in a Bluetooth connection.
- **[hrm_service.c](hrm_service.c.md)**: Implements Bluetooth HRM service support check and handles HRM measurement data.
- **[id.c](id.c.md)**: Functions for managing Bluetooth device identity and address operations in a QEMU environment.
- **[init.c](init.c.md)**: Initializes and manages Bluetooth driver operations for QEMU in the Pebble firmware.
- **[logging.c](logging.c.md)**: Functions to set and get the logging level for a Bluetooth firmware endpoint.
- **[pairability.c](pairability.c.md)**: Functions to enable or disable Bluetooth LE and classic pairability.
- **[pairing_confirm.c](pairing_confirm.c.md)**: Function for Bluetooth pairing confirmation using a user confirmation context.
- **[pebble_pairing_service.c](pebble_pairing_service.c.md)**: Handles status changes for Bluetooth pairing in the Pebble firmware.
- **[qemu_transport.c](qemu_transport.c.md)**: Implements QEMU transport for managing communication sessions over Bluetooth in the Pebble firmware.
- **[reconnect.c](reconnect.c.md)**: Functions for managing Bluetooth reconnection, including pause, resume, and reset operations.
- **[responsiveness.c](responsiveness.c.md)**: Handles Bluetooth LE connection parameter updates for a specified device.
- **[sniff.c](sniff.c.md)**: Defines a function to get the sniff interval for app communication, currently returning zero.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling Bluetooth firmware with specific source files and dependencies.
